commands.review_summary:
The branch removes ClawHub browser-specific static moderation reason codes and rules, updates affected unit tests to expect clean scans, and changes acceptable-use/security-moderation wording to say SkillSpector owns browser-automation analysis.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: the PR diff directly changes browser-abuse fixtures to expect clean static scans and removes anti-bot/CAPTCHA examples from the public policy. I did not run tests because this review was required to keep the checkout read-only.
